product_name: Nut Bars with Cocoa Drizzle & Sea Salt
ingredients_text: ALMONDS, DARK CHOCOLATE FLAVORED COATING (CHICORY ROOT INULIN, SUGAR, PALM KERNEL OIL, COCOA POWDER PROCESSED WITH ALKALI, SOY LECITHIN, SALT, DRY WHOLE MILK), CASHEWS, CHICORY ROOT EXTRACT, SUNFLOWER SEEDS, HONEY, PECANS, RICE SYRUP, CRISP RICE (RICE FLOUR, SUGAR, CALCIUM CARBONATE, SALT), SEA SALT, SOY LECITHIN.
